title: NASA OSSI Internships and Scholarships
description: Paid internships and scholarship opportunities for students in STEM. Undergraduate and graduate students can apply for positions at NASA centers.
eligibility: US citizen, enrolled in accredited institution, STEM major

title: Society of Women Engineers Scholarship
description: Multiple scholarships for women pursuing ABET-accredited engineering or computer science degrees. Over 300 awards annually.
eligibility: Female, pursuing engineering or CS degree, SWE member

title: NSF Graduate Research Fellowship
description: Five-year fellowship for graduate students in STEM. $37,000 stipend per year plus education allowance.
eligibility: US citizen or permanent resident, early-stage grad student in STEM

title: Golden Key GE Foundation STEM Scholarship
description: Scholarships for Golden Key members in STEM. Multiple awards for undergraduate and graduate students.
eligibility: Golden Key member, STEM major, 3.5+ GPA

title: Google Generation Scholarship
description: Scholarship for underrepresented students in computer science. $10,000 for undergrads in the US.
eligibility: Underrepresented in tech, pursuing CS or related, US or Canada

title: Microsoft Tuition Scholarship
description: Tuition scholarship for students pursuing degrees in computer science and related technical fields. Focus on underrepresented groups.
eligibility: Full-time student in CS or related field, 2.5+ GPA

title: SME Education Foundation Scholarships
description: Scholarships for students pursuing manufacturing and engineering careers. Multiple awards for high school and college students.
eligibility: Pursuing manufacturing/engineering, US or Canada, 2.0+ GPA

title: AAAS Entry Point Internship
description: Paid internships for students with disabilities in STEM. Partner employers include NASA, NIH, and major corporations.
eligibility: Student with disability, pursuing STEM, US citizen

title: OAR Scholarship Program
description: Scholarships for students on the autism spectrum. Awards for undergraduate and graduate students pursuing any field.
eligibility: Diagnosed autism spectrum, enrolled or enrolling in accredited institution

title: Hispanic Scholarship Fund
description: Scholarships for Hispanic students. Multiple awards for undergraduate and graduate students in any major.
eligibility: Hispanic heritage, US citizen or DACA, 3.0+ GPA, full-time student

title: UNCF Scholarships
description: Multiple scholarships for African American students. Supports HBCU and other students in any major.
eligibility: African American, US citizen, enrolled at UNCF member or other accredited school

title: Catching the Dream Scholarship
description: Scholarships for Native American students. Supports undergraduate and graduate students in any field.
eligibility: Enrolled member of federally recognized tribe, 3.0+ GPA

title: Point Foundation Scholarship
description: Scholarships for LGBTQ+ students. Financial support plus leadership programming and mentorship.
eligibility: LGBTQ+ identifying, enrolled or enrolling in accredited US institution

title: DAAD Study Scholarship
description: Funding for US and Canadian students to study or research in Germany. Graduate and undergraduate programs.
eligibility: US or Canadian citizen, enrolled in or accepted to degree program

title: Fulbright US Student Program
description: Research or teaching assistantship abroad. Covers travel, living, and project expenses in over 140 countries.
eligibility: US citizen, bachelor's degree or equivalent by start of grant
